creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Set LICENSE_FILE
- Add tests
  - One test (test_lots_of_names) is disabled now as it fails
- Remove six from dependencies (support for Python 2 was dropped in https://github.com/jstasiak/python-zeroconf/commit/f22f421e4e6bf1ca7671b1eb540ba09fbf1e04b1)
- Improve package description
